description: First dashboard on a fresh board — frame must be created and seeded with initial state
query: Update the Miro dashboard. Spec just landed; builder is now active.
expected_behavior: creates a frame named 'APD Pipeline Dashboard' on the configured board
seeds Pipeline Status table with spec=DONE, builder=ACTIVE, reviewer=—, verifier=—
adds a placeholder Metrics document explaining there are no completed cycles yet
returns the board URL after the dashboard is in place
